rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of grouped citations, mainly to justify using a two-wave longitudinal design for linking behaviors/evaluations to later relationship performance and once as a generic example that relational behaviors occur in buyer-supplier management. The citing paper does not engage the cited paper's reciprocity framework, hypotheses, or core findings in its own theory development. Because the role is background/method support without a distinct paper-specific contribution in the argument, this is best treated as a passing mention.
